hero.h1: AI-Powered Cloud Contact Center & VoIP Solution for Global Teams
hero.subtitle: Deliver seamless customer connections, scale instantly, and reduce operational costs with our AI-enabled contact center and VoIP infrastructure.
hero.definition: VestaCall unifies voice, messaging, analytics, and automation into one intelligent cloud communication platform — designed to elevate support, sales, and remote operations.

containers.title: AI-Powered Intelligence
containers.description: Leverage real-time analytics, predictive sentiment insights, and intelligent routing to understand your customers before they speak.
containers.painPoint: Stop guessing what customers need—AI knows before they ask.

containers.title: Global Cloud Network
containers.description: Deliver crystal-clear voice quality with low latency across 100+ countries using our global cloud VoIP network.
containers.painPoint: Your calls connect instantly, anywhere in the world.

containers.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
containers.description: Secure every interaction with bank-grade compliance and industry-standard encryption.
containers.painPoint: Bank-grade security without the bank-grade complexity.

why_vestacall.title: Why Choose VestaCall
why_vestacall.description: Businesses trust VestaCall for reliability, scalability, and intelligent automation.

features.title: Powerful AI-Driven Features
features.description: Every feature designed to automate what slows you down and amplify what matters: customer relationships.

items.heading: Smart Call Routing & IVR
items.description: Build IVR workflows visually and route every customer to the right agent based on skill, language, or priority.
items.keywords: Smart Routing, IVR Builder, Skills-Based Queues

items.heading: AI Sentiment & Engagement Insights
items.description: Detect mood, urgency, and satisfaction in real-time to improve agent outcomes and boost retention.
items.keywords: Live Sentiment Scoring, Customer Journey Insights, Churn Alerts

items.heading: Global Voice & SIP Trunking
items.description: Connect calls across borders with high quality voice termination and cost-competitive SIP channels.
items.keywords: Wholesale Rates, Local Numbers, Unlimited Channels

items.heading: 24/7 Virtual AI Receptionist
items.description: Manage calls when your team is offline — automated lead qualification, FAQs, and transfers.

items.heading: Unified Omnichannel Inbox
items.description: Support voice, chat, email, and social messaging from a single agent workspace.

items.heading: CRM & Business Integrations
items.description: Automate logging and screen-pop customer data from Salesforce, HubSpot, Zendesk, and more.
items.keywords: Native CRM Connectors, One-Click Logging, Contact Sync

comparison.title: VestaCall vs. Competitors

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about VestaCall.

items.question: What is a cloud contact center?
items.answer: A cloud contact center is a web-hosted communication hub that unifies voice, email, chat, and social channels to support customer engagement without on-premise hardware.

items.question: How quickly can I launch VestaCall?
items.answer: You can launch and configure your contact center in minutes with drag-and-drop tools, cloud portals, and automated onboarding.

items.question: Do you support international calling?
items.answer: Yes — our global SIP termination connects to more than 100 countries with high ASR and optimized routes.

items.question: What differentiates VestaCall from traditional VoIP?
items.answer: Unlike traditional VoIP, VestaCall offers real-time AI, omnichannel routing, and automation natively — not as expensive add-ons.

items.question: Is the platform secure and compliant?
items.answer: Yes — VestaCall is fully encrypted and compliant with GDPR, HIPAA, and SOC 2 security standards.

cta.title: Stop Losing Revenue to Missed Calls & Poor CX
cta.description: Get started with a free setup, number porting, and a 14-day no-credit-card free trial.
cta.guarantee: No credit card required. Full access. Start in 5 minutes.
